scripts.licenses:frontend: license-checker --json --out src/assets/npm-licenses.json && node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const path='./src/assets/npm-licenses.json'; const d=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(path)); Object.values(d).forEach(v=>{if(v.licenseFile) v.licenseText=fs.readFileSync(v.licenseFile,'utf8')}); fs.writeFileSync(path,JSON.stringify(d,null,2))"
scripts.licenses:backend: cd src-tauri && cargo about generate about.hbs > ../src/assets/cargo-licenses.json
scripts.prebuild: npm run licenses:frontend && npm run licenses:backend
scripts.build: npm run prebuild && tsc && vite build
